main.description: Books an available time on an actor's connected calendar. Attendee details and booking results are private backend data and are not written to the ATProto repository.

actor.description: DID or handle of the actor whose calendar is being booked.

start.description: Inclusive start of the requested booking.

end.description: Exclusive end of the requested booking.

attendeeName.description: Name displayed to the calendar owner.

attendeeEmail.description: Email address used for the calendar invitation and booking updates.

attendeeTimeZone.description: Optional IANA timezone name for attendee-facing confirmations.

message.description: Optional private note from the attendee to the calendar owner.

idempotencyKey.description: Client-generated key used to safely retry this booking request.

bookingId.description: Opaque backend identifier for the booking.

errors.name: InvalidRequest
errors.description: The requested range or attendee details are invalid.

errors.name: SlotUnavailable
errors.description: The requested time is no longer available.

errors.name: CalendarUnavailable
errors.description: The actor's calendar connection is temporarily unavailable.
